_comment: 20 support tickets to classify as bug | feature | question. No labels here (student copy). Gold labels live in instructor/gold_labels.json. Several tickets are genuinely ambiguous.

tickets.text: The app crashes when I click Export. Stack trace attached.
Can you add a dark mode?
How do I reset my password?
Login returns a 500 error after the latest deploy.
It would be great to filter the dashboard by date range.
What's the difference between the Pro and Team plans?
Uploads over 2 MB silently fail — no error, nothing happens.
Search is slow; I think you should add Elasticsearch.
Is there an API rate limit, and what is it?
Clicking 'Save' twice creates duplicate records.
Please support CSV export in addition to PDF.
Why was I charged twice this month?
The onboarding flow is confusing and I almost gave up.
Two-factor codes arrive about five minutes late.
Do you offer a discount for non-profits?
Add keyboard shortcuts for power users.
On small screens the mobile layout overlaps.
Does the export include archived items?
Not sure if this is a bug, but the totals look off after I apply a coupon.
Please integrate with Slack for notifications.
